visual.name: bfvzPowerHealth
visual.description: BFVZ POWERHealth v5.8.0 — DCMA 14-Point schedule health analyzer with Partner Center license API integration (creator/viewer/trial tiers, cached verification, sample-mode fallback), modern format pane (getFormattingModel), rendering events, tri-strategy optimization engine, multi-resource conflict detection, educational tooltip system, cascade diagnostics, dataset validation, narrative panel, global tooltip modes, global font adjustment, enriched CSV exports. 19 data roles, 12 format pane objects, 107 properties.

dataRoles.name: milestoneType
dataRoles.description: Optional. Non-empty value marks task as milestone (e.g. 'permit', 'inspection', 'closeout'). Overrides duration-based detection.

hdrProgramName.description: Display name for the program shown in the header bar. Leave blank to hide.

hdrOwnerPM.description: Name of the owner/client project manager displayed in the header context bar.

hdrOwnerCtrl.description: Name of the owner/client project controller displayed in the header context bar.

comparisonView.description: Visual graphic shown per project in the program comparison table.

showNarrative.description: When enabled, displays the auto-generated status narrative and recommended actions below the dashboard KPIs.

showStatusExport.description: Display a CSV export of the status summary at the bottom of the dashboard panel. Off by default.

showDatasetValidation.description: Display data quality pre-flight checks at the bottom of the dashboard. Off by default.

phaseOrderConfig.description: Canonical phase order for the Phase Progress graphic. Comma-separated phase name prefixes, matched case-insensitively. Phases not listed appear at the end. Example: 'Site,Permit,Design,Civil,Structure,Electrical,Mechanical,Fire,Low Voltage,Commission,IT'

tipTimelineMode.description: Educational: full guide explaining how to read the graphic. Informational: data and assessment only. Off: no tooltip.

tipCompareMode.description: Controls tooltips on the Program-Project Health Comparison table rows.

showRegExport.description: When enabled, displays a copyable CSV export of the filtered risk register below the table. Off by default.

resSimDepth.description: Number of conflict groups to analyze (1–100). Each group processes up to 5 conflict windows. Higher values analyze more resources but take longer. Default 3 (15 windows). Set to 50+ for large programs with many shared resources.

resMaxShift.displayName: Max Shift Days (0 = use full float)

resMinUtil.description: Minimum resource utilization target. Recommendations that drop utilization below this threshold are penalized in ranking. Default: 70%.

resMaxOptSteps.description: Maximum number of steps the Program-Level Optimization solver will attempt. Higher values allow more thorough resolution on large programs but take longer. Default: 200.

tipShowOptCurves.description: Show rich tooltips on the Current/Optimized resource curves in the optimization plan panel.

resMaxMatrixRows.description: Maximum number of resources to display in the utilization matrix, sorted by peak utilization. Set to 0 to show all resources. Default: 0 (all).

resMinCompress.description: Minimum duration ratio when compressing tasks (0.75 = tasks can be compressed to 75% of original duration). Lower values allow more aggressive compression.

tipOptMode.description: Controls the detail level of optimization tooltips. Educational: full strategy explanation with how/when/trade-offs/PMO guidance. Informational: concise metrics only. Off: no tooltips.

tipUnresMode.description: Controls tooltips on the Unresolvable Conflicts table rows.

tipAutoSolveMode.description: Controls tooltips on the Optimization Plan summary metrics.

tipLevelCurveMode.description: Controls tooltips on the Current vs Optimized resource utilization curves in the leveling area.

showOptExport.description: When enabled, displays a copyable CSV optimization plan summary below the Auto-Solve panel. Off by default.

showLevelExport.description: When enabled, displays a copyable CSV summary of all accepted and rejected leveling recommendations below the recommendations table. Off by default.

showUnresExport.description: When enabled, displays a copyable CSV unresolvable conflicts summary below the unresolvable conflicts table. Off by default.

globalTooltipMode.description: Master control for all tooltips. Educational: full explanations. Informational: data + concise context. Metrics Only: numbers only, no prose. Off: all tooltips disabled. Per Section: use individual controls below.
